name: ask
description: General Q&A with persistent conversation history for follow-up questions

name: bind_context
description: Prepend a system prompt to input and call an LLM

name: chain
description: Execute a planner JSON plan: run each process in order, pipe outputs between steps

name: changelog_gen
description: Generate a CHANGELOG.md entry from git log commits

name: dockerfile_gen
description: Generate an optimized multi-stage Dockerfile for a Go service

name: echo
description: Echo input text back to stdout unchanged

name: error_diagnose
description: Diagnose error messages and stack traces, suggest root cause and fix

name: go_api_gen
description: Generate a Go HTTP handler (net/http style) from an endpoint description

name: go_bench
description: Generate Go benchmark functions (testing.B) for performance testing

name: go_channel_patterns
description: Generate Go concurrency patterns: pipeline, fan-out/in, worker pool, timeout, done channel

input.description: pattern name or description (e.g. 'worker pool with 5 workers')

name: go_commit_msg
description: Generate a conventional commit message from a git diff of Go code

name: go_concurrency_review
description: Review Go concurrency: goroutine leaks, race conditions, channel patterns, sync usage

name: go_config_gen
description: Generate a Go config struct loaded from environment variables

input.description: list of config fields or service description

name: go_context_gen
description: Add context.Context propagation to Go functions and method calls

name: go_doc
description: Add or improve godoc comments for exported Go functions, types, and methods

name: go_error_wrap
description: Improve Go error handling: wrap with context, use sentinel errors, errors.Is/As

name: go_explain
description: Explain Go code in plain language, including patterns and gotchas

name: go_generics
description: Refactor Go code to use generics (type parameters) or explain existing generic code

name: go_graceful_shutdown
description: Add graceful shutdown with signal handling to a Go HTTP/gRPC server

name: go_grpc_gen
description: Generate Go gRPC server implementation from a proto service definition

name: go_interface
description: Infer a minimal Go interface from a struct's methods or usage patterns

name: go_middleware_gen
description: Generate Go HTTP middleware (net/http) from a description

name: go_migrate_gen
description: Generate SQL up/down migrations from Go struct changes (PostgreSQL by default)

input.description: old and new go struct definitions

name: go_mock
description: Generate a testify/mock compatible mock struct for a Go interface

name: go_openapi_gen
description: Generate OpenAPI 3.0 YAML spec from Go HTTP handler code and struct definitions

input.description: go http handler code with request/response structs

name: go_refactor
description: Suggest and apply refactors to Go code: extract interface, reduce duplication, improve naming

input.description: go source code (optionally with refactor goal)

name: go_repo_gen
description: Generate a Go Repository interface and PostgreSQL implementation for a domain entity

name: go_review
description: Review Go code for correctness, idioms, error handling, and best practices

name: go_struct_gen
description: Generate Go structs from a natural language description or sample JSON

name: go_test_gen
description: Generate table-driven Go unit tests for the given function or struct

input.description: go function or struct source code

name: go_wire_gen
description: Generate Go dependency injection wiring (manual wire-style injector function)

input.description: component list with dependencies (or existing structs)

name: json_format
description: Validate and pretty-print JSON with 2-space indentation

name: llm_call
description: Send input text to an LLM and return the response

name: llm_chat
description: Multi-turn LLM conversation with persistent session history

name: makefile_gen
description: Generate a Makefile with common Go targets: build, test, lint, docker, migrate

name: planner
description: Decompose a natural language task into an ordered sequence of process calls

name: pr_review
description: Review a git diff as a senior engineer — logic, safety, style

name: regex_explain
description: Explain a regular expression pattern in plain language with examples

name: shell_explain
description: Explain a shell command or bash script in plain language

name: slugify
description: Convert text into a URL-safe slug (lowercase ASCII, hyphen-separated)

name: sql_explain
description: Explain SQL queries and suggest index/performance improvements

name: summarize
description: Summarize text into concise bullet points

name: translate_zh
description: Translate text to Traditional Chinese (繁體中文)

name: yaml_explain
description: Explain a YAML config file (k8s, docker-compose, GitHub Actions, etc.) in plain language
